clusters.leadHeadline: NWSL Adds 18th Team in Columbus; Haslams Pay $205M
clusters.summary: The NWSL continues expansion strategy with Columbus as 18th franchise. Haslam Sports Group's $205M investment signals strong investor confidence in women's soccer growth.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Rookie Deals Top $50M for First Time Since 2010
clusters.summary: Top 2025 NFL draft pick will earn nearly $55M, reflecting inflation in rookie contracts. Market dynamics and salary cap considerations reshape entry-level compensation.

clusters.leadHeadline: NIL Dispute Over 'Associated Entities' Could Shatter Salary Cap
clusters.summary: College sports face regulatory crisis as NIL definition disputes threaten any remaining salary cap structure. Legal battle over entity classifications could reshape athlete compensation.

clusters.leadHeadline: ESPN Defends NCAA Gymnastics Coverage After Minnesota Complaint
clusters.summary: Minnesota challenged ESPN's broadcast equity in gymnastics coverage. Dispute highlights ongoing tensions over media rights allocation and broadcast fairness across NCAA sports.

clusters.leadHeadline: Churchill Downs Acquires Preakness Stakes IP Rights for $85M
clusters.summary: Churchill Downs expands portfolio by securing intellectual property rights to Preakness Stakes. Strategic consolidation of Triple Crown assets strengthens company's racing brand control.
